summary: Completed testing of PDF generation feature for Factures. All backend API tests passed (10/10 = 100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The PDF endpoints work correctly and the UI buttons are properly displayed using <a> tags instead of window.open() to avoid Chrome blocking.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/factures returns list of factures (1 test facture found: FAC-2026-03-TEST01)
Backend: GET /api/factures/{id}/pdf returns valid PDF with Content-Type: application/pdf
Backend: GET /api/factures/{id}/pdf returns Content-Disposition: inline (for browser viewing)
Backend: GET /api/factures/{id}/pdf returns PDF starting with %PDF magic bytes
Backend: GET /api/factures/{id}/download returns valid PDF with Content-Type: application/pdf
Backend: GET /api/factures/{id}/download returns Content-Disposition: attachment (for download)
Backend: GET /api/factures/{id}/download includes filename in Content-Disposition header
Backend: GET /api/factures/{id}/pdf returns 404 for non-existent facture
Backend: GET /api/factures/{id}/download returns 404 for non-existent facture
Backend: PDF has valid structure (%%EOF marker, object definitions)
Backend: PDF size is reasonable (15KB)
Backend: GET /api/factures/{id} returns facture details with all required fields (lignes, montants, client info)
Frontend Factures: PDF button (FileDown icon with red color text-red-600) visible in Actions column
Frontend Factures: PDF button uses <a> tag with target='_blank' (not window.open) - Chrome blocking fixed
Frontend Factures: PDF button href points to correct API endpoint (/api/factures/{id}/pdf)
Frontend Factures: 'Voir le PDF' button visible in facture detail dialog
Frontend Factures: 'Voir le PDF' button uses <a> tag - Chrome blocking fixed
Frontend Factures: 'Télécharger' button visible in facture detail dialog
Frontend Factures: 'Télécharger' button uses <a> tag with download attribute
Frontend Contrats: PDF button uses <a> tag (not window.open) - Chrome blocking fixed
Frontend Contrats: 'Voir le PDF' button uses <a> tag - Chrome blocking fixed
Frontend Contrats: 'Télécharger' button uses <a> tag - Chrome blocking fixed
seed_data_creation: Used existing test facture FAC-2026-03-TEST01 (ID: 8223eaa7-00c9-46b0-8363-4dee0f1d3c37) with 2 lignes de facturation for 1029€ TTC.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF generation feature for Factures is fully functional. The /api/factures/{id}/pdf endpoint returns PDF inline for browser viewing, and /api/factures/{id}/download returns PDF as attachment for download. Frontend has PDF button (red FileDown icon) in table Actions column and 'Voir le PDF' + 'Télécharger' buttons in the view dialog. Both Factures and Contrats pages now use <a> tags instead of window.open() to avoid Chrome popup blocking.

chrome_blocking_fix.issue: window.open() was being blocked by Chrome popup blocker
chrome_blocking_fix.status: FIXED in both Factures.jsx and Contrats.jsx
